results.rendered_html:
1. śvit cl. 1. Ā. ( Dhātup. xviii, 2 ) śvetate (occurring only in pr. p. śvetamāna,  Mālatīm. , and in aor. aśvait or aśvitat, p. śvitāna [q.v.]  RV. ; Gr. also pf. śiśvite fut. śvetitā, śvetiṣyate, and aor. aśvetiṣṭa),
to be bright or white :
Caus. (only aor. aśiśvitat; but cf. śvetaya and śvetita) id.,  RV.

results.rendered_html:
1. śvit , śvetate  DHĀTUP. 18,2  (varṇe; śauklye  VOP. ). zu belegen nur śvitāna, aśvait, aśvitan (vgl.  P. 3,1,55 ) und aśiśvitat. Bildung des partic. praet. pass.  P. 7,2,16. fg.  weiss —, licht —, hell sein: sa (agniḥ) śvitānastanyatū rocanasthāḥ  ṚV. 6,6,2 . (uṣāḥ) ruśadvāso bibhratī śukramaśvait 7,77,2 . (uṣāḥ) aruṇapsuraśiśvitat 8,5,1 .
— ava herleuchten: aveyamaśvaidyuvatiḥ purastāt  ṚV. 1,124,11 .
— vi hell sein, strahlen: die Uṣas  ṚV. 1,92,12 . 113,15 . (marutaḥ) śubhaṃyavo nāñjibhirvyaśvitan 10,78,7 .
